summary: Complete testing of Certificate Preview PDF feature. All backend endpoints (7/7 tests passed) and frontend UI elements verified successfully. The 'Visualizar Certificado' button is present with correct data-testid, generates valid PDF, and opens in new tab.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Certificate Preview PDF feature is fully working. The endpoint GET /api/certificate-settings/preview-pdf returns valid PDF (application/pdf content-type, ~1.28MB). Frontend button with data-testid='preview-certificate-btn' triggers PDF generation and opens in new tab. All three tabs (Logo & Marca, Termos, Procedimento) work correctly.

GET /api/certificate-settings/preview-pd.description: Returns valid PDF with correct headers (Content-Type: application/pdf, Content-Disposition: inline)

Preview PDF Authentication.description: Endpoint correctly returns 401 for unauthenticated requests

Frontend Preview Button.description: Button with data-testid='preview-certificate-btn' is visible and clickable

Certificate Settings Tabs.description: All three tabs (Logo & Marca, Termos, Procedimento) are present and functional

Super Admin Access.description: Super admin can generate preview PDF

mocked_apis.email_service: Prints to console instead of sending real emails

bug_fix_verified.issue: dict.items() conflict in Jinja2 template (section['items'] vs section.items())
bug_fix_verified.verification: PDF generation works correctly without template errors
